code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws_byte(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn is_ws_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    is_ws_byte(b)
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn is_nl_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 10
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)

  mut tokens = "\n"
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws_at(input, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      let start = i
      while i < n and not is_ws_at(input, i)
        i = i + 1
      end
      let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
      tokens = "#{tokens}#{tok}\n"
    end
  end

  let total = string.len(tokens)
  mut best_token = ""
  mut best_count = 0
  mut j = 1
  while j < total
    mut k = j
    while k < total and not is_nl_at(tokens, k)
      k = k + 1
    end
    let tok = string.substring(tokens, j, k)
    let prefix = string.substring(tokens, 0, j)
    let needle = "\n#{tok}\n"
    if not string.contains(prefix, needle)
      mut count = 0
      mut p = 1
      while p < total
        mut q = p
        while q < total and not is_nl_at(tokens, q)
          q = q + 1
        end
        let other = string.substring(tokens, p, q)
        if other == tok
          count = count + 1
        end
        p = q + 1
      end
      if count > best_count
        best_count = count
        best_token = tok
      end
    end
    j = k + 1
  end

  println("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
end
